title: Navbar
description: A navigation bar component that supports custom styling and encapsulation. It provides a consistent way to display navigation elements with prefix, title, and suffix content areas.

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using the ax-navbar component to display a navigation bar with prefix, title, and suffix content

sections.title: Look Variants
sections.description: Different visual appearance styles for the navbar component

sections.title: Content Projection
sections.description: Using content projection slots to customize navbar content

types.title: AXNavbarComponent
types.description: A navigation bar component that supports custom styling and encapsulation

props.name: look
props.description: Visual appearance style of the navbar. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: lookChange
events.description: Emitted when the look property changes. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

methods.name: getHostElement
methods.description: Gets the host HTML element of the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.
methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

methods.name: setOption
methods.description: Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

parameters.name: option
parameters.description: The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.

methods.content:
/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)
